title: hypericum montanum
intro: Hypericum montanum, also known as Mountain St. John's Wort, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and woody stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hypericum montanum include its ability to treat minor wounds, reduce anxiety and insomnia, and alleviate symptoms of depression. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
